prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约3217名→3992名→2754名→2487名→2722名，整体呈波动走势。2021至2022年位次后移约775名，2023年大幅前移至2754名，2024年进一步前移至2487名（近五年最佳），2025年小幅后移至2722名。近三年位次在2487–2722区间窄幅波动，2025年基准约2722名；该校在山西省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年85人、2022年79人、2023年85人、2024年85人、2025年92人、2026年91人（以招生计划文件为准）。2026年较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13名区间，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件及校园安全舆情；抖音热度排名第29（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常方面：2022年在多省出现招生爆冷断档，2023年投档线大幅下降，2025年广东考生报考热情受一定影响。综合来看，负面舆情可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用，但学校顶尖层次仍具较强吸引力；第五轮学科评估中，中山大学拥有23个A-及以上学科，包括生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2722名、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（91人 vs 92人）、物理类考生减少约3.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素。缩招与考生减少基本抵消，声誉负面可能轻微抑制报考热度，但学校顶尖层次和雄厚学科实力仍具吸引力。预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约2704名，区间2396–3012名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3217 → 3992 → 2754 → 2487 → 2722, showing a fluctuating trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 775 places, then significantly advanced to 2754 in 2023, further advanced to 2487 in 2024 (the best in the past five years), and slightly moved back to 2722 in 2025. In the past three years, the ranking fluctuated narrowly within the 2487–2722 range, with a baseline of about 2722 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province: 85 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 85 in 2024, 92 in 2025, and 91 in 2026 (subject to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student, a slight contraction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and campus safety public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Historical admission anomalies: in 2022, there were cold spots and gaps in multiple provinces, with a significant drop in admission lines in 2023, and in 2025, the enthusiasm of Guangdong candidates was somewhat affected. Overall, negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology, but the top-tier level of the school still has strong appeal; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province (about 4.68% in 2025) is relatively stable, and cross-province application enthusiasm is affected by regional preferences, with South China universities having moderate appeal to northern candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2722, the slight contraction in the 2026 enrollment plan (91 vs. 92), a 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation. The contraction and candidate reduction roughly offset each other, and the negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but the top-tier level and strong disciplinary strength of the school remain attractive. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will be approximately 2704, with a range of 2396–3012.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2396–3012, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, Microelectronics, etc.), with Tier 1 Clinical Medicine/Stomatology as sprint targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 basic science majors as safe backups. Sun Yat-sen University's medical and computer/electronic information majors have high social popularity and excellent discipline evaluations, making them core competitive directions for high-scoring candidates.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 485, 434, 452, 431, and 448, fluctuating narrowly within the 430–485 range. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi Province: 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 21 in 2026 (subject to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 4 students, a contraction of about 16%, which has a significant impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and campus safety public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot). Historical admission anomalies: in 2022, there were cold snaps and gaps in multiple provinces, with admission scores dropping significantly in 2023, but the liberal arts ranking trend in Shanxi Province was relatively stable without obvious gaps; Sun Yat-sen University has prominent liberal arts advantages: Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, etc., strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 63,113 history category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025, significantly reducing the candidate pool and easing competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 448, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (21 vs 25, -16%), the substantial decrease in history category candidates by about 25.6%, and the somewhat negative reputation. The enrollment contraction pushes the ranking number smaller (increased competition), but the large decrease in candidates (-25.6%) significantly eases competition, with the two factors offsetting to actually ease competition. The negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts (history category) is approximately 405, with a range of 359–451.
